questions.explanation: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar chaired the Drafting Committee of the Indian Constitution.

questions.text: The Magna Carta was signed in 1215 and limited the powers of the English King.
questions.explanation: The Magna Carta was indeed signed in 1215 by King John.

questions.text: Which article of the Indian Constitution grants Fundamental Rights?
questions.explanation: Articles 12–35 of the Indian Constitution deal with Fundamental Rights.

questions.text: Match the independence leaders with their independence movements:
questions.explanation: These leaders are associated with their respective freedom movements.

questions.text: The Sepoy Mutiny occurred in which year?
questions.explanation: The Revolt of 1857 began in May 1857.

questions.text: The French Revolution took place in the 18th century.
Which of these were Mughal emperors? (Select all correct)
questions.explanation: Akbar, Shah Jahan, and Aurangzeb were Mughal emperors.

questions.text: Assertion: Democracy requires a constitution. Reason: A constitution defines the structure and powers of government.
questions.explanation: Both statements are true, and the reason correctly explains the assertion.
